summary: Drill Down Feature (Phase 2B) Testing Complete. All drill-down functionality is working correctly including widget drill hierarchy, breadcrumb navigation, reset button, and data API integration.

issues: Widget 'Sales by Quarter' has w=6 instead of w=4, so not exactly 3-per-row layout. First and third widgets have w=4 correctly.

backend_api: PASS: GET /api/dashboards/{id}/widgets - Returns 3 widgets with correct structure
PASS: POST /api/widgets/{id}/data with filters={} - Returns unfiltered data (drilled=false)
PASS: POST /api/widgets/{id}/data with drill_level=Quarter and filters={Region: East} - Returns drilled data (Q1: 52000, Q2: 55000)
PASS: POST /api/widgets/{id}/data - Response includes drilled=true and current_x_field when drill_level is provided
PASS: Widget d8705a2f-d1b3-4bd3-a608-3784bb69e291 has drilldown hierarchy ['Region', 'Quarter']
PASS: Cross-filter still works on non-drillable widgets (filtered=true, drilled=false)
frontend_drill_down: PASS: Widget with drilldown hierarchy shows 'Drill' badge (cyan bg-cyan-500/10 text-cyan-400)
PASS: Clicking bar in drillable chart triggers drill-down (changes to Q1/Q2 view)
PASS: DrillBreadcrumb appears above drilled widget showing 'Region: East'
PASS: DrillBreadcrumb has Home icon and Reset button
PASS: Reset button returns to top level (Region view with 5 bars)
PASS: Drilled widgets show 'Drilled' badge (changes from 'Drill' to 'Drilled')
PASS: Toast notification shows 'Drilled into Region: East' and 'Drill reset to top level'
PASS: data-testid attributes present: widget-{id}, drill-breadcrumb

context_for_next_testing_agent: Drill-down feature fully implemented and working. Test dashboard ID: e5f3240e-a009-4df5-9124-be7c7c960944. Widget 'd8705a2f-d1b3-4bd3-a608-3784bb69e291' has drilldown hierarchy ['Region', 'Quarter']. Drill flow: 1) Widget shows 'Drill' badge, 2) Click bar -> drillDown() called, 3) DrillBreadcrumb appears with path, 4) POST /widgets/{id}/data with drill_level fetches grouped data, 5) Widget shows 'Drilled' badge. Click Reset or breadcrumb to navigate back. Cross-filtering still works on non-drillable charts.

frontend.context: DashboardFilterContext.jsx - provides drill state management: initDrillState, getDrillState, drillDown, drillNavigate, drillReset, hasDrillDown, isDrilledDown, canDrillFurther

components.DashboardWidget: Has handleChartClick that checks for drilldown hierarchy, calls onDrillDown instead of cross-filter
components.DrillBreadcrumb: Shows path with Home icon, field:value chips, and Reset button
components.Badge: 'Drill' badge (cyan) when canDrill=true, 'Drilled' badge when isDrilled=true
